# Chapter 3: Machine elements: fasteners, springs, joints  (~120 pp)
- 3.1 Bolted joints: preload, friction, fatigue (20) · 3.2 Welded joints (15) · 3.3 Adhesive joints (12) · 3.4 Springs: helical, leaf, Belleville, gas (18) · 3.5 Shaft design and keyways (15) · 3.6 Couplings and clutches (12) · 3.7 Failure section: bolt-loosening accidents, weld-failure aviation, joint creep (28)

**Archetype**: failure, scaling. **Project**: design a bolted joint to withstand fatigue loading; verify torque-tension. **Exercises**: 35.
